mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SURVEY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_SURVEY ( survey_number, survey_type, member_number, admin_number, file_number, survey_approval, survey_app_date ) VALUES ( #{surveyNumber}, #{surveyType}, #{memberNumber}, 1, #{fileNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 'P', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.member_type, m.member_name, s.survey_number, s.survey_type, s.survey_approval, s.survey_rej_reason, s.survey_app_date, s.admin_number, s.file_number, s.member_number, sm.grad_school, sm.grad_depart, sm.grad_score, se.mentee_school, se.mentee_grade, se.mentee_hopeuni, se.mentee_hopemajor, NVL(sm.subject_number, se.subject_number) AS subject_number FROM UB_MEMBER m JOIN UB_SURVEY s ON m.member_number = s.member_number LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR sm ON s.survey_number = sm.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTEE se ON s.survey_number = se.survey_number WHERE m.member_number = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY s.survey_number DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UB_SURVEY WHERE member_number = #{memberNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.survey_number, s.survey_type, s.survey_approval, s.survey_rej_reason, s.survey_app_date, s.file_number, s.member_number, m.member_type, m.member_name, sm.grad_school, sm.grad_depart, sm.grad_score, sm.subject_number FROM UB_SURVEY s JOIN UB_MEMBER m ON s.member_number = m.member_number JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR sm ON s.survey_number = sm.survey_number WHERE s.member_number = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY s.survey_number DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.survey_number, s.survey_type, s.survey_approval, s.survey_rej_reason, s.survey_app_date, s.file_number, s.member_number, m.member_type, m.member_name, se.mentee_school, se.mentee_grade, se.mentee_hopeuni, se.mentee_hopemajor, se.subject_number FROM UB_SURVEY s JOIN UB_MEMBER m ON s.member_number = m.member_number JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTEE se ON s.survey_number = se.survey_number WHERE s.member_number = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY s.survey_number DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE UB_SURVEY SET survey_type = #{surveyType}, member_number = #{memberNumber}, admin_number = #{adminNumber}, -- 혹은 고정값 1 file_number = #{fileNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER}, survey_approval = #{surveyApproval}, -- 필요 시 'P' 등으로 고정 survey_app_date = SYSDATE -- 수정 시간을 현재로 갱신할 경우 WHERE survey_number = #{surveyNumber}
